function e(e){if(!e)return!1;let t=e.getBoundingClientRect();return t.top>=0&&t.left>=0&&t.bottom<=(window.innerHeight||document.documentElement.clientHeight)&&t.right<=(window.innerWidth||document.documentElement.clientWidth)}const t={XS:640,SM:900,MD:1200,LG:1600};function n(e){return e<t.XS?`XS`:e<t.SM?`SM`:e<t.MD?`MD`:e<t.LG?`LG`:`XL`}function r(e){return e.replace(/\s([^\s<]+)\s*$/g,`\xA0$1`)}export{e as i,r as n,n as r,t};
//# sourceMappingURL=utils-D3a9E7KX.js.map
